name: @babmcp/bab
description: Bab MCP server with delegate plugins, AI provider registry, and plugin author SDK.

scripts.build: bun run scripts/bundle-plugins.ts && mkdir -p dist/sdk && bun build src/cli.ts --target bun --outfile dist/cli.js && bun build src/server.ts --target bun --outfile dist/server.js && bun build src/sdk/index.ts --target bun --outfile dist/sdk/index.js && bun build src/sdk/test-utils.ts --target bun --outfile dist/sdk/test-utils.js
scripts.build:binary: bun run scripts/bundle-plugins.ts && bun build --compile src/cli.ts --outfile dist/bab
scripts.lint: biome check src/ tests/ scripts/ plugins/
scripts.format:check: biome format src/ tests/ scripts/ plugins/ *.md *.json
